1000638893.english: - When I looked at her suspiciously, Hresvelg took off her glasses.
1000638893.korean: - 내가 의심스러운 눈길로 바라보자 흐레스벨그는 쓰고 있던 안경을 벗었다.

1000638896.english: - Hraesvelgr's choreography was excellent enough to give me confidence.
1000638896.korean: - 흐레스벨그의 안무는 자신감을 가질 정도로 훌륭했다.

1000638897.english: We can't say anything either, since it's like this.

1000638898.english: Since she plans all the positions and movements herself, she definitely knows them better than we do.
1000638898.korean: 포지션이랑 동선도 다 자기가 짜니까 우리보다 확실히 알고 있고.

1000638899.english: I ended up approaching it with such sincerity without even realizing it. I am ashamed.
1000638899.korean: 저도 모르게 진심으로 임하고 말았군요. 부끄럽습니다.

1000638900.english: Yes. Always before going to sleep, I see myself on stage singing—
1000638900.korean: 네. 항상 자기 전에, 무대에 올라 노래하는 제 모습을-

1000638903.english: If I fantasize about singing really well on stage and getting cheered for, or coolly saving someone, I can fall asleep feeling good, right?
1000638903.korean: 자기 전에 막, 무대에서 노래 엄청 잘해서 환호받는거나, 멋있게 누구 구해주는 장면 망상하면 기분좋게 잠들 수 있는거지?

1000638905.english: Come to think of it... I thought it was weird that sometimes, when I saw her, she was wearing a sleep mask but just had her mouth hanging open.
1000638905.korean: 어쩐지... 가끔 보면 수면 안대 쓰고 입만 헤죽거리길래 이상하다고 생각했어.

1000638908.english: ...Why don't you just relax now? It's too pitiful to watch anymore.
1000638908.korean: ...이제 그냥 편해지는 게 어때? 안쓰러워서 더는 못보겠어.

1000638909.english: Producer, have you heard our group song?

1000638910.english: Right. Now, this song... Ah, we've named our first song.
1000638910.korean: 그쵸. 이제 이 곡... 아, 저희 첫번째 곡 제목 붙였어요.

1000638913.english: - It was definitely a lyric that kept repeating in the chorus. Lover lover~
1000638913.korean: - 분명 후렴구에 계속 반복되는 가사였었지. 러버러버~

1000638914.english: Yes. Now that I’m quite used to "Lover Lover," I plan to focus more on practicing the unit songs and the new songs.
1000638914.korean: 네. 이제 러버러버는 많이 익숙해졌으니까, 유닛곡이랑 새 곡을 좀 더 중점적으로 연습하려구요.

1000638916.english: I'm telling you, you just need to move your body like that, floppy, even when doing the choreography!
1000638916.korean: 안무할때도 몸을 그렇게 흐늘흐늘 움직이면 된다니까?

1000638917.english: Things just don't go the way I want...

1000638918.english: Let's hang in there. It's getting better.

1000638920.english: We all finally have outfits, don't we?

1000638921.english: - Before I could even call, Sleipnir and Hraesvelgr ran over to me and snatched the costume.
1000638921.korean: - 부르기도 전에 슬레이프니르와 흐레스벨그는 내게 달려와 의상을 냉큼 받아갔다.

1000638930.english: I guess there's nothing we can do...

1000638932.english: - Hresvelg’s expression slowly brightened as she took what I had handed her.
1000638932.korean: - 내가 건네준 것을 받아든 흐레스벨그의 표정이 천천히 밝아졌다.

1000638934.english: - Holding a patch modeled after her favorite Momo sticker, Hresvelg smiled brightly from behind her glasses.
1000638934.korean: - 좋아하는 모모스티커 모양을 본딴 패치를 손에 쥔 흐레스벨그는 안경 너머로 환하게 미소지었다.

1000638935.english: Thank you very much. Then, I'll go change right away and be right back.
1000638935.korean: 정말 감사합니다. 그럼, 바로 갈아입고 올게요.

1000638939.english: - Just a moment—Sleipnir, who had changed clothes in the blink of an eye, darted into my arms as if flying.
1000638939.korean: - 잠시 기다리자, 순식간에 옷을 갈아입고 온 슬레이프니르가 날듯이 내 품으로 파고들었다.

1000638942.english: I would also like to thank you, Producer.

1000638943.english: This is the first time I've ever felt so uplifted.

1000638944.english: I don't know how to repay you...

1000638946.english: Yeah... but because of me, we couldn't really start...
1000638946.korean: 응... 그런데 나 때문에 본격적으로 시작하진 못했어...

1000638948.english: Did you forget? I told you there's no choreography.

1000638949.english: However, there is an unexpected obstacle: playing musical instruments.

1000638950.english: Due to the nature of the band song, difficulties are expected in the arrangement process as well.
1000638950.korean: 밴드곡이라는 특성상, 편곡 작업에도 난항이 예상됩니다.

1000638951.english: The three of us will each take one part, and for the empty one, we'll use a synthesizer.
1000638951.korean: 셋이서 하나씩 맡고, 비는 건 신디사이저를 쓸 거야.

1000638952.english: No? Hraesvelgr is going to do it.

1000638953.english: - Unfazed by Sleipnir’s brazen reply, Hresvelg spoke with a serious expression.
1000638953.korean: - 뻔뻔하기까지 한 슬레이프니르의 대답에도 동요하지 않고, 흐레스벨그는 진지한 표정으로 입을 열었다.

1000638954.english: The time has finally come to show off your skills.

1000638955.english: My life is always with music. I am confident in my ear for music.
1000638955.korean: 제 생은 언제나 음악과 함께. 듣는 귀만큼은 자신 있습니다.

1000638956.english: Once you learn how to use it, composing and arranging are entirely possible.
1000638956.korean: 사용법을 배우기만 하면 작곡과 편곡 정도는 얼마든지 가능하죠.

1000638957.english: Musical instruments... which one requires the least physical movement...
1000638957.korean: 악기... 어떤 게 제일 몸을 안 움직일까...

1000638958.english: - I also got up, following Harpyia as she staggered to her feet.
1000638958.korean: - 비틀거리며 일어나는 하르페이아를 따라 나도 자리를 털고 일어났다.

1000638959.english: Yes. You are welcome to come anytime.

1000638960.english: Make sure to come watch us play together!

1000638961.english: As for songs... I've read a lot of theory books...

1000638962.english: - Leaving behind Harpyia and the other crew members who were waving goodbye wistfully, I headed to the captain's quarters to attend to my duties.
1000638962.korean: - 처연하게 손을 흔드는 하르페이아와 다른 대원들을 뒤로하고, 업무를 보기 위해 함장실로 향했다.

1000638963.english: - I decided to stop by Muse's room after finishing work.
1000638963.korean: - 적당히 업무를 마치고 뮤즈의 방에 들르기로 했다.

1000638964.english: - As I walked down the hallway and arrived at the door, I heard singing coming from inside the room.
1000638964.korean: - 복도를 걸어 문 앞에 도착하자 방 안에서 노래 소리가 들렸다.

1000638965.english: - I was listening to music for a moment when I knocked on the door.
1000638965.korean: - 잠시 노래를 듣고 있다 문을 두드렸다.

1000638969.english: Ah, no... it's not like that...

1000638971.english: – Before I knew it, I was sitting inside Muse's room filled with all kinds of equipment.
1000638971.korean: - 어느새 각종 장비로 가득 찬 뮤즈의 방으로 들어가 앉았다.

1000638972.english: – Muse carefully closed the door and sat down again, keeping a distance.
1000638972.korean: - 조심스레 문을 닫은 뮤즈는 또다시 멀찍이 떨어져 앉았다.

1000638975.english: - When we first met, I couldn't really talk properly, and I ended up shutting myself in my room right away...
1000638975.korean: - 처음 만났을때는 제대로 이야기를 못했고, 곧 방에 틀어박혀 버렸으니까...

1000638977.english: Thanks to Producer, I'm comfortable here, but still...

1000638978.english: ...Yes. While checking in on the Sky Knights' unit songs little by little, this...
1000638978.korean: ...네. 스카이나이츠 분들 유닛곡 틈틈히 봐드리면서, 이거...

1000638979.english: – Muse nodded slightly and showed me the monitor.
1000638979.korean: - 뮤즈가 작게 끄덕이며 모니터를 내게 보여주었다.

1000638981.english: ...Ah. I-I'm sorry. I just... smiled because...

1000638984.english: – I need to change the subject a bit.

1000638986.english: All of them are really good songs.

1000638988.english: Technically... they are lacking a lot...
1000638988.korean: 기술적, 으로는... 많이 부족한 게 맞아요...

1000638992.english: Yes. Sincerity clumsily pressed down for just one person.
1000638992.korean: 네. 단 한사람을 위해... 서툴게나마 눌러담은, 진심이요.

1000638993.english: – I recalled the lyrics of the songs I had heard for a moment.
1000638993.korean: - 뮤즈의 말에 잠깐 들었던 노래들의 가사를 떠올렸다.

1000638994.english: Putting your heart into the melody... singing with all your heart...
1000638994.korean: 멜로디에 마음을 담아... 진심을 다해 부르는 것...

1000638995.english: That's what a true song is... and those songs are definitely good songs.
1000638995.korean: 그거야말로 진정한 노래니까... 그 노래들은 분명히, 좋은 노래예요.

1000638997.english: I-I'm sorry... I got carried away by the mood and said something strange...
1000638997.korean: 죄, 죄송해요... 분위기에 휩쓸려서 이상한 말을...

1000638999.english: I want to create songs that are sung with sincerity.
1000638999.korean: 진심을 담아 부르는... 그런 노래를 만들고 싶어요.

1000639003.english: – Watching Muse visibly nervous, I sat back down in the chair.
1000639003.korean: - 눈에 보일 정도로 안절부절하는 뮤즈를 보며 다시 의자에 앉았다.

1000639004.english: – After waiting for a while, Muse finally spoke in a voice as small as a mosquito's.
1000639004.korean: - 얼마나 기다렸을까, 마침내 뮤즈는 모기만한 목소리로 입을 열었다.

1000639010.english: - After the muse nodded slightly, I left the room.
1000639010.korean: - 작게 고개를 끄덕이는 뮤즈를 뒤로하고 방을 나섰다.

1000639011.english: - Through the bangs that fell again, it seemed like the transparent eyes I saw before were happily curved.
1000639011.korean: - 다시 내린 앞머리 사이로, 전에 봤던 투명한 눈이 기쁘게 휘어지는 것 같았다.

1000639012.english: - I took the elevator heading to the deck to check the progress of the stage setup.
1000639012.korean: - 무대 설치 진척 상황을 보기 위해 갑판으로 향하는 엘리베이터에 올랐다.

1000639013.english: - I heard from Azaz that they've been working on it since last night...
1000639013.korean: - 아자즈에게 듣기로, 어젯 밤부터 작업을 진행했다고 하던데...

1000639014.english: - As the elevator doors opened, an amazing sight unfolded.
1000639014.korean: - 엘리베이터 문이 열리자, 놀라운 광경이 펼쳐졌다.

1000639017.english: It's not finished building yet, is it?

1000639018.english: There is still some finishing up left.

1000639019.english: I received some help from the AGS members. Oh, here is the request form. I forgot to submit it first.
1000639019.korean: AGS분들의 도움을 좀 받았죠. 아, 여기 요청서예요. 먼저 제출한다는게 깜빡했네요.

1000639020.english: - The paper Azaz handed over had nothing but handwritten text that read, "I'll be working with a few members of AGS. Azaz."
1000639020.korean: - 아자즈가 내민 종이에는 손글씨로, 'AGS 몇 분이랑 같이 작업할게요. 아자즈.' 라고 적혀있을 뿐이었다.

1000639021.english: Oh my, was there such a thing? I'm sorry.

1000639024.english: Yes. Thanks to Mr. Azaz's cooperation, everything is going smoothly.
1000639024.korean: 네. 아자즈 씨가 협력해주셔서 전부 순조로워요.

1000639025.english: I never thought I'd end up working with that 'Deconstructor'...

1000639026.english: I actually don't really like that tinnitus.
1000639026.korean: 그 이명, 사실 별로 마음에 안들어요.

1000639027.english: I prefer making things rather than dismantling them.
1000639027.korean: 저는 해체하는 것보단 만드는게 더 좋거든요.

1000639029.english: Producer! What is that? No way...

1000639031.english: - Behind Griffon, who was looking up at the stage with a look of utter despair, other Sky Knights members came up onto the deck one after another.
1000639031.korean: - 망연자실한 표정으로 무대를 올려다보는 그리폰의 뒤로, 다른 스카이나이츠 대원들이 연이어 갑판으로 올라왔다.

1000639033.english: So you were setting up a stage on the deck...

1000639035.english: Th-this kind of stage is nothing! No, it has to be at least this level to make singing worthwhile!
1000639035.korean: 이, 이정도 무대는 아무것도 아냐! 아니, 이정도는 돼야 노래할 맛이 나지!

1000639036.english: I, I didn't expect it to be this big...

1000639037.english: It is a bit of a burden for me as well.

1000639039.english: Producer! Can I go up now?

1000639041.english: Eh? Why? I think it's all finished.
1000639041.korean: 에에~? 왜요? 다 지은 것 같은데.

1000639042.english: Because the safety inspection hasn't been done yet.

1000639043.english: Hey... did you make all of this overnight?

1000639044.english: Yes. I'm a bit of a night owl.

1000639045.english: Hehe, come visit anytime if it's night. You are always welcome, Commander.
1000639045.korean: 후후, 밤이라면 언제든 찾아와요. 사령관이라면 언제나 환영이에요.

1000639047.english: Come to think of it, it doesn't necessarily have to be night.
1000639047.korean: 생각해보니 꼭 밤이어야만 하는 건 아니네요.

1000639048.english: Actually, it’s not a big deal if you come by while I’m sleeping during the day.
1000639048.korean: 낮에 제가 자고있을 때 찾아오셔도 사실 별 문제는 없어요.

1000639049.english: - Just as I was sweating profusely, struggling to keep up with the conversation, a sharp voice was heard.
1000639049.korean: - 여전히 대화를 따라가기 어려워 진땀을 흘리고 있을때, 날카로운 목소리가 들렸다.

1000639050.english: What are you goofing off about?

1000639051.english: My work can't progress because your work has stopped!
1000639051.korean: 너희 작업이 멈춰서 내 작업이 진행이 안되잖아!

1000639052.english: Oh, is that so? What kind of work is needed?

1000639053.english: External wiring. Go fix it quickly. I need to connect the sound system.
1000639053.korean: 외부 배선. 빨리 가서 해놔. 음향 장치 연결해야-

1000639054.english: If it's that, I did it at dawn. Um... 6 hours and 20 minutes ago.

1000639058.english: Well then, I’ll get started on the safety check. If we wait any longer, Miss Sleipnir might get so hot she’ll collapse.
1000639058.korean: 그럼 저는 안전 검사를 시작할게요. 더 지체했다간 슬레이프니르 양이 몸이 달아서 쓰러져버릴 것 같으니까.

1000639060.english: - As soon as Azaz finished the safety inspection, the Sky Knights went up onto the stage.
1000639060.korean: - 아자즈가 안전검사를 끝내자마자, 스카이나이츠는 무대 위로 올라갔다.

1000639061.english: - Azaz, who was sitting together in the makeshift staff seats, suddenly spoke up.
1000639061.korean: - 임시로 마련된 스태프석에 함께 앉아있던 아자즈가 문득 입을 열었다.

1000639062.english: I'm looking forward to the performance, but... I really want to sunbathe on this deck.
1000639062.korean: 저는 공연도 기대되지만... 어서 이 갑판에서 일광욕을 하고 싶네요.

1000639063.english: Hehe, just imagining it makes me feel good.

1000639064.english: Hmm... it would be hard to get up. So, Commander, please come wake me up.
1000639064.korean: 음... 일어나기 힘들긴 하겠네요. 그러니까 사령관이 깨우러 와줘요.

1000639065.english: That’s kind of tempting. After all, the deck is the best part of this dreary submarine.
1000639065.korean: 그건 좀 솔깃하네. 이 칙칙한 잠수함에서 그나마 나은 곳이 갑판이니까.

1000639066.english: Hey, you. For Lady Draculina— Ah. Thank you.
1000639066.korean: 이봐, 너. 드라큐리나님을 위해- 앗. 고마워.

1000639067.english: - Draculina sipped the tomato juice I handed her with a happy expression.
1000639067.korean: - 드라큐리나는 행복한 얼굴로 내가 내민 토마토 쥬스를 쪼르륵 빨아들였다.

1000639068.english: - ...I'm glad she's not a bad kid.

1000639070.english: - As if finding something so amusing, the laughter of the Sky Knights as they looked around the stage was ceaseless.
1000639070.korean: - 뭐가 그렇게 즐거운지, 무대를 둘러보는 스카이나이츠의 웃음소리는 끊이질 않았다.

1000639071.english: Maybe this is... the kind of person I was hoping for.
1000639071.korean: 이런게... 제가 바라던 모습이었던 걸지도 모르겠네요.

1000639072.english: Finding joy in the little things... finding happiness in everyday life...
1000639072.korean: 별 거 아닌 거에도 즐거워하면서... 일상 속에서 행복을 찾는...

1000639073.english: How about you, Commander? Seeing the others enjoying themselves like that...
1000639073.korean: 사령관은 어때요? 저렇게 다른 분들이 즐거워하는 모습을 보면.

1000639074.english: - While lost in thought for a moment, I made eye contact with Sleipnir on the stage.
1000639074.korean: - 잠시 생각에 잠긴 사이, 무대 위의 슬레이프니르와 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000639075.english: - As Sleipnir smiled broadly and waved at me, the other members also called out to me and waved back.
1000639075.korean: - 슬레이프니르가 활짝 웃으며 내게 손을 흔들자, 다른 대원들도 나를 부르며 손을 흔들었다.

1000639076.english: - Azaz and Machina smiled at the same time at the words that came out unintentionally while waving at each other.
1000639076.korean: - 마주 손을 흔들어주다 무심코 나온 말에 아자즈와 마키나가 동시에 빙그레 미소지었다.

1000639078.english: You are truly a selfless person, Commander.

1000639079.english: - To hide my embarrassment, I asked what just came to mind.
1000639079.korean: - 쑥쓰러움을 감추기 위해 마침 떠오른 것을 물었다.

1000639081.english: Hmph. Do you think I'd be swayed by a stage just like this?
1000639081.korean: 흥. 내가 겨우 이정도 무대에 혹할 것 같아?

1000639082.english: As promised, prepare a much bigger stage later. Then I'll think about performing on stage.
1000639082.korean: 약속대로 나중에 훨씬 더 커다란 무대나 준비하도록 해. 그러면 무대에 서는 걸 생각해볼테니까.

1000639083.english: I was curious about how this young lady came over; was that the reason?
1000639083.korean: 이 아가씨가 넘어온 계기가 궁금했는데, 그런 거였나요?

1000639084.english: Just try breaking your promise. I will never forgive you.
1000639084.korean: 약속 안 지키기만 해봐. 절대로 용서 안해.

1000639085.english: You don't have to worry about that.

1000639088.english: The stage is really amazing! Incredible!

1000639089.english: My legs are trembling even as I go up now...

1000639091.english: I think I should show this to Muse, so I'm about to go pick her up. Is that okay?
1000639091.korean: 뮤즈한테도 보여줘야 할 것 같아서 지금 데리러 가려고 하는데, 괜찮을까요?

1000639092.english: What about the producer? Going to work?

1000639093.english: - I stood up, stretched, and was about to head to the elevator when something grabbed my collar from behind.
1000639093.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 기지개를 켜고 엘리베이터로 향하려는데, 무언가 뒤에서 옷깃을 붙잡았다.

1000639094.english: Don't push yourself too hard for us.

1000639095.english: ...We can't miss our performance if we keep doing that.

1000639096.english: Huh. You’re always so smooth with your words.

1000639098.english: Is it really okay if I don't watch the stage?

1000639101.english: Hehe, well, we can see about it during the rehearsal later.
1000639101.korean: 헤헷, 뭐 나중에 리허설 때 보면 되니까.

1000639102.english: But it's really peaceful and nice here.

1000639103.english: So Muse likes places like this?

1000639104.english: Yes... I feel calm in places like this. It's quiet...
1000639104.korean: 네에... 이런 곳에서는 마음이 차분해져서요. 조용하고...

1000639105.english: I thought this when I scouted the area a while ago, but it looks like this place used to be a tourist spot in the past.
1000639105.korean: 얼마전 정찰했을때도 생각했지만, 이곳은 과거에 관광지였던 모양이군요.

1000639106.english: There are traces remaining here and there.

1000639107.english: Is that so... I'm not really good at that...

1000639108.english: If you spend time with the producer, you will learn things one by one.
1000639108.korean: 프로듀서랑 같이 있다보면 하나씩 알아가게 될 거야.

1000639109.english: He's just dying to do all sorts of things with us.
1000639109.korean: 우리랑 이것저것 하고 싶어서 안달이 나신 분이니까.

1000639110.english: If it's this and that... that...

1000639112.english: For the sake of the producer’s reputation, I’ll make excuses on his behalf.
1000639112.korean: 프, 프로듀서의 명예를 위해 제가 대신 변명하겠습니다.

1000639113.english: It’s not necessarily just that. There are various festivals, anniversaries, and so on...
1000639113.korean: 꼭 그런 것만 있는 건 아닙니다. 여러 축제라던지, 기념일이라던지...

1000639114.english: In addition to that, everything from small hobbies to the quality of life, such as meals and accommodations.
1000639114.korean: 그것 외에도 소소한 취미생활부터, 식사, 숙소 등의 삶의 질까지.

1000639115.english: The producer takes care of everything about us.
1000639115.korean: 프로듀서는 저희의 모든 것을 신경써주시고 계십니다.

1000639116.english: Still, I was surprised when they suddenly suggested we become idols.
1000639116.korean: 그래도 갑자기 아이돌 하자고 했을 때는 깜짝 놀랐어.

1000639119.english: Really? I thought you seduced the producer and got him to cheat on you~
1000639119.korean: 그래? 나는 네가 프로듀서 유혹해서 바람 넣은 줄 알았지~

1000639122.english: That is a desirable attitude. If you are an idol to the masses, then you really should... Ha...
1000639122.korean: 바람직한 자세입니다. 만인의 우상이라면 역시 그래야... 하...

1000639124.english: It's unlikely the former commander did that first.
1000639124.korean: 전대장이 먼저 그런 건 아닐 거야.

1000639125.english: He acts confident on the outside, but he's actually a total airhead and social butterfly.

1000639127.english: You can tell the former commander is a total airhead just by looking at how she treats the producer these days.
1000639127.korean: 전대장이 쑥맥인 건 요새 프로듀서 대하는 것만 봐도 알지.

1000639129.english: Hey, you know how actively I've been trying to appeal to producers lately!
1000639129.korean: 요, 요새 내가 얼마나 적극적으로 프로듀서한테 어필하는데!

1000639131.english: That's good, but it's too... how should I put it? You're treating them too casually.
1000639131.korean: 그건 좋은데, 너무... 뭐랄까. 편하게 대하잖아.

1000639133.english: Yeah. You keep running to hug me and saying you love me as if it’s nothing.
1000639133.korean: 응. 자꾸 달려가서 안기고, 사랑한다고 아무렇지도 않게 말하구 그러잖아.

1000639134.english: That's... because, if I'm conscious of it, I'll be embarrassed...

1000639135.english: You shouldn't do that. There's no excitement.

1000639136.english: Feeling comfortable without any excitement is the end of a relationship between a man and a woman.
1000639136.korean: 설렘이 없이 편한 사이로 느껴지는 건, 남녀관계의 끝이라구.

1000639140.english: Yeah. It is highly likely that the producer regards the former commander as just a comfortable female friend.
1000639140.korean: 응. 프로듀서에게 전대장은, 그냥 편한 여자사람친구로 여겨지고 있을 가능성이 높아.

1000639141.english: No, that's ridiculous! How can there be such a law!
1000639141.korean: 마, 말도 안돼! 그런 법이 어딨어!

1000639142.english: Harpe, how did you know that? Is it from your own experience?!
1000639142.korean: 하르페, 너는 그거 어떻게 안 거야? 혹시 경험담?!

1000639143.english: I saw it in a book.

1000639145.english: No, wait a minute. Harpe has been hugging the producer a lot lately, too.
1000639145.korean: 아니, 잠깐만. 요새 하르페도 프로듀서한테 막 안기고 그러잖아.

1000639147.english: I definitely saw it! Especially when she was sly after practice.
1000639147.korean: 확실히 봤다구! 특히 연습 끝나고 힘들다면서 은근슬쩍.

1000639152.english: Linti is always clinging to the producer, too.

1000639153.english: It doesn't matter because Linti is cute~

1000639154.english: How could a producer see such a cute Linti as just a comfortable female friend?
1000639154.korean: 프로듀서가 이런 귀여운 린티를 어떻게 편한 여자사람친구로 보겠어?

1000639156.english: This won't do, let's all go find the producer together-

1000639157.english: Wow, the idiot is going berserk.

1000639158.english: It looks like it's spread a bit to Harpe too.

1000639159.english: Maybe it's because we've been stuck together a lot lately because of the unit...
1000639159.korean: 요새 유닛때문에 자주 같이 붙어있어서 그런가...

1000639161.english: Don't worry about it. It happens often.

1000639163.english: You all like the producer... right...?

1000639166.english: Well... I, I don't dislike it.

1000639170.english: No wonder she only blushes in front of the producer~

1000639171.english: You haven't even been here long...

1000639172.english: Was there a reason for that?

1000639175.english: Fell in love at first sight... How romantic~

1000639176.english: Is it true? I kept avoiding eye contact with the producer and thought at first meeting...
1000639176.korean: 진짜야? 나는 계속 프로듀서랑 눈을 안마주치고 그, 처음 만났을때...

1000639177.english: I thought you didn't like me because you mistook that for a weird interview...
1000639177.korean: 이, 이상한 인터뷰로 착각해서 별로 안좋아하는 줄 알았는데...

1000639180.english: What did the muse like about the producer?

1000639182.english: If you fall in love at first sight, is there really a reason? It's just because it's good. Right.
1000639182.korean: 첫눈에 반했는데 이유같은 게 어딨겠어. 그냥 좋은 거지. 그치.

1000639184.english: Linti also fell for the producer at first sight—I could probably come up with a hundred reasons why, right?
1000639184.korean: 린티도 프로듀서한테 첫눈에 반했는데, 그런 이유 백가지는 댈 수 있는걸?

1000639185.english: First, telling Linti she's cute; second, telling Linti she's pretty—
1000639185.korean: 첫 번째는 린티한테 귀엽다고 해주는 거, 두 번째는 린티한테 예쁘다고 해주는 거-

1000639186.english: Let's go to the room and talk. We have to talk about the song too.
1000639186.korean: 우리, 방에 가서 이야기하자. 노래 얘기도 해야되니까.

1000639187.english: Okay. She's started again, it'll probably end by the time we go back.
1000639187.korean: 그래. 쟤 또 시작한 거, 돌아갈때쯤 끝나겠지.

1000639190.english: There are only a few hours left!

1000639192.english: What if I forget the lyrics...

1000639193.english: You've practiced countless times. You'll be able to do it well.
1000639193.korean: 수도 없이 연습 했잖아요. 잘 할 수 있을 겁니다.

1000639195.english: The seating area looks wider than last time...

1000639197.english: I'm really looking forward to it, right?

1000639199.english: I am nervous, but I think it's going to be fun.

1000639200.english: I'm really looking forward to Linti too. It's a chance to let everyone know how cute Linti is, isn't it?
1000639200.korean: 린티도 엄청 기대돼. 린티의 귀여움을 모두에게 알릴 수 있는 기회잖아?

1000639204.english: You're all watching the performance, right...?

1000639207.english: Ah! Just like I said last time, you're planning to use that as an excuse to go backstage before we start and say, "Would you share some of your body heat with me so I can cheer up...?" right?
1000639207.korean: 아! 저번에 말한 것처럼, 그걸 핑계로 시작 전에 무대 뒤에서 '힘 낼 수 있도록 프로듀서의 체온, 나눠주시겠어요...?' 하려는 거지?

1000639208.english: When did I ever do that!

1000639210.english: Ah, so that's it? After the performance, 'Producer... I just can't hide it. Ever since I was on stage...'
1000639210.korean: 아, 그거구나? 공연 끝나고나서, '프로듀서... 저 도저히 숨길 수 없어요. 무대 위에서부터 계속...'

1000639213.english: It's a relief that you seem to have relaxed a bit.
1000639213.korean: 긴장이 좀 풀린 것 같아서 다행이네.

1000639214.english: Producer, can I go straight up?

1000639215.english: - The members were seen busily conducting final checks here and there on the stage.
1000639215.korean: - 무대 이곳저곳에서 분주히 최종 점검중인 대원들의 모습이 보였다.

1000639216.english: That's right! The snacks I prepared for the kids helping out on stage!
1000639216.korean: 맞다! 무대 도와주는 애들 주려고 준비한 간식!

1000639217.english: I left it at the accommodation!

1000639219.english: Producer, please give this to the staff...

1000639220.english: - Hresvelg pointed to the boxes piled up in the back.

1000639221.english: Because we emptied all the emergency funds we had saved.

1000639222.english: I'll just cut out snacks for the time being and consider it a diet.
1000639222.korean: 당분간 간식 끊고 다이어트 하는 셈 치지 뭐.

1000639223.english: Honestly, I'm so sorry. Everyone is doing this for us...
1000639223.korean: 솔직히 너무 미안해. 다들 우리를 위해서 이렇게...

1000639225.english: Of course. I'm not really doing this for you guys.
1000639225.korean: 그럼요. 별로 여러분을 위해서 하는 건 아니에요.

1000639228.english: No, rather, is it unusual for us?

1000639229.english: I find these moments incredibly enjoyable and precious. So much so that I actually want to be the one thanking you.
1000639229.korean: 이런 시간은 굉장히 즐겁고, 소중하게 느껴져요. 오히려 제가 감사드리고 싶을 정도로.

1000639230.english: You're right, Machina. Every day is full of battles, big and small, so it would be a shame not to have an event like this.
1000639230.korean: 마키나 씨의 말대로예요. 매일매일이 크고 작은 전투인데, 이런 이벤트라도 없으면 섭섭하죠.

1000639231.english: Yum... This is delicious. Can I have some more?
1000639231.korean: 냠... 이거 맛있네요. 더 먹어도 되나요?

1000639232.english: Uh, yeah... eat as much as you want...

1000639234.english: Yeah! Thank you all so much! I'll repay you with the best performance!
1000639234.korean: 응! 다들 정말 고마워! 최고의 무대로 보답할게!

1000639235.english: Hehe, I'm looking forward to it.

1000639236.english: I will also assist you with great direction.

1000639238.english: - Azaz picked up an unknown part rolling around on the deck and suddenly fell into deep thought.
1000639238.korean: - 아자즈는 갑판에서 굴러다니던 알 수 없는 부품을 하나 주워들더니, 갑자기 깊은 사색에 잠겼다.

1000639240.english: I still can't get used to this side of Azaz.
1000639240.korean: 아자즈 씨의 이런 모습, 아직도 적응이 안되네요.

1000639241.english: Even though we've talked a lot lately...

1000639242.english: Yes. However, we became close personally, and I even visited your room a few times; you often show this kind of behavior.
1000639242.korean: 네. 그렇지만 사적으로도 친해져서 몇 번 방에도 찾아갔었는데, 종종 이런 모습을 보이세요.

1000639243.english: As expected... you must have been inspired by a new weapon, right? After all, you are the 'Deconstructor'.
1000639243.korean: 역시... 새로운 병기에 대한 영감이라도 받으신 거겠죠? 그 '해체자' 이니까요.

1000639244.english: - I think they are coming up with an idea to combine the Lamparion model and the Tyrant model...
1000639244.korean: - 내 생각엔 램파리온 모형과 타이런트 모형을 합체시킬 아이디어를 떠올리고 있는 것 같은데...

1000639245.english: I'm sorry, I have something urgent to attend to, so I'll be out for a moment.
1000639245.korean: 미안해요, 급한 볼일이 생겨서 잠깐 자리를 좀 비울게요.

1000639246.english: See you in a little while.

1000639248.english: I suppose you went to the armory, didn't you? Or maybe you went to consult with Dr. ...
1000639248.korean: 역시 무기고로 가신 거겠죠? 아니면 닥터 씨와 상의를 하러 갔거나...

1000639250.english: Hey, am I the only one who can't keep up with the conversation?

1000639251.english: Why are you goofing off again?

1000639252.english: Draculina! Thanks for the sound equipment!

1000639255.english: Of course, I, Draculina, have finished it perfectly. We just need to make the final adjustments during the rehearsal later.
1000639255.korean: 당연히 이 드라큐리나 님이 완벽하게 끝내뒀어. 이따 리허설하면서 최종 조정만 하면 돼.

1000639258.english: Anyway... just like last time, are you going to keep wearing that now?
1000639258.korean: 그나저나... 저번에도 그렇고, 이제 계속 그거 입고 다니는거야?

1000639259.english: Yeah. I liked it, so I'm going to keep wearing it even after the performance ends.
1000639259.korean: 응. 마음에 들었으니까, 공연 끝나고도 계속 입을거야.

1000639260.english: That's a good idea. It's a huge improvement compared to that penguin-like vinyl suit we used to wear when going on sorties.
1000639260.korean: 잘 생각했어. 전에 그, 출격할 때 입던 펭귄 비스무레한 비닐옷에 비하면 장족의 발전이야.

1000639262.english: Hey! What kind of penguin is that! Have you ever seen a flying penguin?
1000639262.korean: 야! 그게 무슨 펭귄이야! 날아다니는 펭귄 봤어?

1000639265.english: Then, I, Lady Draculina, will go continue enjoying the entertainment.
1000639265.korean: 그럼 이 드라큐리나님은 마저 여흥을 즐기러 갈게.

1000639266.english: You. This isn't enough, so make sure to prepare some more tomato juice.
1000639266.korean: 너. 이거로는 모자라니까, 토마토 쥬스를 더 준비해두도록 해.

1000639267.english: - Draculina, who shot down Sleipnir in an instant with just a few words, sipped the tomato juice from the pack and leisurely disappeared.
1000639267.korean: - 말 몇마디로 순식간에 슬레이프니르를 격추한 드라큐리나는 팩에 담긴 토마토쥬스를 쪼르륵 마시며 유유히 사라졌다.

1000639269.english: Producer... Producer, you thought my combat uniform looked like a penguin too...?
1000639269.korean: 프로듀서... 프로듀서도 내 전투복, 펭귄 같다고 생각했어...?

1000639271.english: I don't know... but it can't be a penguin... Where would you find a flying penguin...
1000639271.korean: 몰라... 그래도 펭귄은 아닐 거야... 날아다니는 펭귄이 어디있어...

1000639272.english: ...No. It doesn't matter if it's a penguin or whatever. Because I am me...!

1000639273.english: - As expected of Sleipnir. With her overflowing self-confidence, she quickly regained her identity.
1000639273.korean: - 역시 슬레이프니르. 넘치는 자존감으로 정체성을 금세 되찾았다.

1000639276.english: Producer, I was a swallow! Fast and agile!

1000639279.english: - After struggling for a while to get a good look at her earrings, Sleipnir borrowed a hand mirror from Linti and let out a scream.
1000639279.korean: - 한동안 자기 귀걸이를 보려고 애쓰던 슬레이프니르는 린티에게 손거울을 빌리곤 비명을 질렀다.

1000639281.english: I just... saw it with the clothes...

1000639283.english: You look happy, but I'm sorry. The final check is finished.
1000639283.korean: 즐거워 보이는데 미안해요. 최종 점검 끝났어요.

1000639285.english: The stage production is also ready.

1000639288.english: Haa, haa... This is a disaster!

1000639289.english: The muse, the muse is gone!

1000639290.english: It was late, so I went to check the room a little while ago, but it was completely empty, and they aren't in our accommodation either...
1000639290.korean: 늦길래 조금 전에 방에 찾아가봤는데 텅 비어있고, 저희 숙소에도 없고...

1000639292.english: - The griffon held out a small note.

1000639293.english: - There, written in Muse's handwriting that I had seen a few times and was familiar with, was 'I'm sorry'.
1000639293.korean: - 거기엔 몇 번 봐서 익숙한 뮤즈의 글씨로, '미안해요'라고 적혀있었다.

1000639298.english: - Upon checking the entry and exit records, it was confirmed that Muse got off the Orca yesterday, just before the end of work hours.
1000639298.korean: - 출입기록을 확인해보니 어제, 일과시간이 끝나기 직전에 뮤즈가 오르카 호에서 내린 것이 확인됐다.

1000639299.english: - Since they are non-combatants, they do not yet have identification signals, so they are in a situation where they must ultimately rely on reconnaissance.
1000639299.korean: - 비전투원이라 아직 식별신호도 없어서 결국 정찰에 의존해야 하는 상황.

1000639300.english: - We instructed the security personnel to search the vicinity, but found nothing significant until the rehearsal ended.
1000639300.korean: - 경계 인원에게 지시해 근방을 수색해봤지만 리허설이 끝날 때까지 별다른 소득이 없었다.

1000639302.english: Uh, what should I do...? We promised to sing together...

1000639303.english: I'll go look for it myself!

1000639304.english: - I calmed the restless Sleipnir and checked the time.

1000639306.english: - Since Muse is performing on stage for the fourth song, we should be able to buy a little more time.
1000639306.korean: - 뮤즈가 함께 무대에 오르는 건 네 번째 곡이니까, 조금 더 시간을 벌 수 있겠지.

1000639307.english: - It looks like we have no choice but to wait for now.
1000639307.korean: - 지금은 일단 기다리는 수밖에 없을 것 같군.

1000639309.english: - Time kept passing, and it was time to enter.
1000639309.korean: - 시간은 계속 흘러, 입장 시간이 됐다.

1000639310.english: - The members, brimming with excitement for their first-ever music performance, fill the audience seats, and the atmosphere in the venue grows increasingly heated.
1000639310.korean: - 처음 겪는 음악 공연에 잔뜩 들뜬 대원들이 관객석을 채우고, 공연장의 열기는 점점 더 뜨거워져간다.

1000639311.english: - However, the faces of the Sky Knights gathered in the captain's quarters were filled with worry.
1000639311.korean: - 하지만, 함장실에 모인 스카이나이츠의 얼굴엔 수심이 가득했다.

1000639313.english: That's a big problem. To think they still haven't found it...

1000639317.english: Lee, Leader! Are you planning to sortie?

1000639320.english: Muse is an Honorary Sky Knight, you know! She's one of our squad!
1000639320.korean: 뮤즈는 명예 스카이나이츠란 말야! 우리 부대원이라구!

1000639321.english: On top of that... we even promised to sing together...
1000639321.korean: 거기다... 꼭 같이 노래하자고 약속도 했고...

1000639323.english: Leader, let's follow the producer's orders here.
1000639323.korean: 리더, 여기선 프로듀서의 말을 따르도록 하죠.

1000639324.english: Even if we go out, there is no guarantee that we will find it within the time limit.
1000639324.korean: 아무리 저희가 나간다고 해도, 시간내에 찾을 거라는 보장이 없어요.

1000639328.english: I'm not saying you should give up. I'm saying we should trust the producer.
1000639328.korean: 포기하라는 말이 아닙니다. 프로듀서를 믿자는 거죠.

1000639331.english: - Lindblum approached Sleipnir, who was nodding dejectedly.
1000639331.korean: - 시무룩하게 고개를 끄덕이는 슬레이프니르에게 린트블룸이 다가왔다.

1000639332.english: Leader, Linty will help you redo your makeup.
1000639332.korean: 리더, 린티가 메이크업 다시 하는 거 도와줄게.

1000639337.english: Then, I'll leave it to you, Producer.

1000639339.english: - We can't add more personnel... so for now, we'll have to reorganize the people who just left... No, we're short on time.
1000639339.korean: - 인원을 더 추가할 수가 없으니... 일단 지금 나간 인원을 재편해서... 아니, 시간이 부족해.

1000639342.english: - If I can't find the Muse by my turn...
1000639342.korean: - 만약, 순서가 올 때까지 뮤즈를 못 찾으면...

1000639343.english: Ugh. I don't want to do that.

1000639344.english: Yeah. So, please make sure to find Muse.

1000639346.english: - After the Griffin left, they formulated a new search plan and began issuing instructions to the personnel on the ground.
1000639346.korean: - 그리폰이 나간 뒤, 다시 수색 계획을 수립하고 현장 인원들에게 지시를 내리기 시작했다.

1000639347.english: - Just as the border troops began to move along the new route, the Orca was felt vibrating along with a shout.
1000639347.korean: - 경계 병력이 새로운 경로로 막 움직이기 시작했을 때, 함성 소리와 함께 오르카 호가 진동하는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000639348.english: - Listening to the faint sound of the Sky Knights' singing, I focused my gaze on the paths of the reconnaissance personnel displayed as dots on the monitor.
1000639348.korean: - 작게 들려오는 스카이나이츠의 노랫소리를 들으며, 모니터에 점으로 표시되는 정찰 인원들의 경로에 시선을 집중했다.

1000639349.english: < Project ORCA, Starry Night Stage > Continued in Part 3.

1000639352.english: You worked hard, you worked hard.

1000639357.english: Are you also doing image training for singing?

1000639364.english: Audra asked me to tell you something.

1000639365.english: That "either wear it as is, or don't wear it at all" thing. Pick one.
1000639365.korean: 그 설마야. 그대로 입거나, 입지 말거나. 둘 중에 고르래.

1000639366.english: Still, I got permission for one thing.

1000639368.english: They call it a patch? It's okay to attach one of these to the hem of your clothes.
1000639368.korean: 패치라고 하던가? 이거 하나 옷자락에 다는 정도는 괜찮대.

1000639369.english: Yeah. I want to see it soon too.

1000639373.english: Right. Sleipnir's side is also practicing as a unit, right?
1000639373.korean: 맞다. 슬레이프니르 쪽도 유닛 연습 하고 있는거지?

1000639378.english: Then I'll go now. I'll drop by the unit practice sometimes.
1000639378.korean: 그럼 이만 가볼게. 유닛 연습도 종종 들러볼거고.

1000639380.english: Come to think of it, other than the first time, we haven't talked for long at all...
1000639380.korean: 그러고보니 처음 빼고는 오래 얘기한 적이 없구나...

1000639381.english: It's not a group song... I don't think I've heard it before?
1000639381.korean: 단체곡도 아니고... 처음 듣는 것 같은데?

1000639383.english: Just a little. Was I not supposed to hear it?

1000639385.english: It's nothing serious. I just felt like I haven't really talked properly with Muse.
1000639385.korean: 별 일은 아냐. 뮤즈하고 제대로 이야기한 적이 없는 것 같아서.

1000639386.english: It's okay. So, is the work going well?

1000639388.english: ...At least I can tell it's sheet music.

1000639391.english: How about the unit song? I haven't fully listened to it yet either.
1000639391.korean: 유닛곡은 어때? 나도 아직 완전히 다 들어보진 못했는데.

1000639392.english: Really? That's impressive... I didn't know our members had that kind of talent.
1000639392.korean: 그래? 대단한데... 우리 대원들한테 그런 재주가 있을 줄은 몰랐어.

1000639397.english: No, I listened well. That's Muse's... musical perspective, right?
1000639397.korean: 아냐. 잘 들었어. 그게 뮤즈의... 음악관인거지?

1000639398.english: Yeah. I'm looking forward to it.

1000639399.english: We need to start preparing the stage setup soon. Why?

1000639401.english: Got it. And Muse, you can come to the captain's room anytime too.
1000639401.korean: 알았어. 그리고 뮤즈도 언제든 함장실에 찾아와도 돼.

1000639402.english: Then I'll go. See you next time.

1000639404.english: No, didn't you say you started last night?
1000639404.korean: 그게 아니라... 어젯 밤부터 시작했다고 하지 않았어?

1000639405.english: And it's not even a dedicated format...

1000639409.english: So that's why it wasn't clear during the day...

1000639412.english: Didn't you say you were nocturnal...?

1000639417.english: Do you really not have to sing during the actual performance?
1000639417.korean: 진짜 공연 때 노래 안해도 되겠어?

1000639419.english: Yeah. Let's slowly take a look together.

1000639422.english: The rehearsal is soon. Are you ready?

1000639424.english: Wait a minute. They'll contact us when the sound and lighting are ready.
1000639424.korean: 잠깐만. 음향하고 조명 준비되면 연락이 올 거야.

1000639429.english: Give thanks to the other members. I haven't really done much.
1000639429.korean: 감사는 다른 대원들한테 해. 나는 별로 한 것도 없으니까.

1000639432.english: No... probably they went to their room to change into comfortable clothes...
1000639432.korean: 아니... 아마 자기 방에 가서 편한 옷으로 갈아입을걸...

1000639437.english: Uh... then what did Sleipnir think?

1000639438.english: Is it that kind of problem...?

1000639441.english: That earring is shaped like a swallow, right?

1000639442.english: Didn't you know that when you wore it?

1000639444.english: What about the thing that happened earlier?

1000639447.english: Did they just go to the bathroom for a moment?

1000639449.english: ...For now, proceed with the rehearsal. I'll look for them.

1000639450.english: There's no other way. Maybe we can find them soon.
1000639450.korean: 달리 방법이 없잖아. 금방 발견할수도 있고.

1000639453.english: There's less than two hours until the performance.

1000639454.english: Other members are looking now, so let's wait a little longer.
1000639454.korean: 지금 다른 대원들이 찾고 있으니까, 좀 더 기다려보자.

1000639455.english: It probably isn't that. Except for the guards, no fights broke out.
1000639455.korean: 그렇진 않을거야. 경계 인원 말고는 전투가 벌어지진 않았어.

1000639456.english: No. There's less than 30 minutes until the show starts.
1000639456.korean: 안 돼. 공연 시작 30분도 안 남았어.

1000639458.english: Okay. Trust me, and sing your heart out on stage like you prepared.
1000639458.korean: 그래. 날 믿고, 준비한대로 무대에서 열심히 노래해줘.

1000639460.english: Sorry for breaking the promise to watch the stage.
1000639460.korean: 무대 보기로 한 약속, 못 지켜서 미안해.

1000639462.english: Should I go up instead of Muse and dance and sing? I've watched so much that I've memorized everything.
1000639462.korean: 내가 뮤즈 대신 올라가서 춤추고 노래할까? 하도봐서 다 외우긴 했는데.

1000639464.english: Got it. I'll be cheering from here.

1000639466.english: No, actually... isn't it a swallow?

1000639469.english: There really isn't much left now...

1000639471.english: ...It will be rewarding as much as you practiced hard.

1000639472.english: Yeah. Especially since Griffin worked the hardest.
1000639472.korean: 응. 특히 그리폰은 제일 열심히 했으니까.

1000639473.english: And they sing their hearts out, too.

1000639474.english: Who do you want to tell this to?

1000639475.english: Hmph. Tease me all you want. It doesn't bother me at all.
1000639475.korean: 흥. 얼마든지 놀려. 나는 아무렇지도 않거든?

1000639476.english: Looks like you're thirsty~? Gulping down this hot tea like that.
1000639476.korean: 목 타나보네~? 이 뜨거운 차를 그렇게 벌컥벌컥.

1000639478.english: Be careful. You don't want to hurt your neck.

1000639480.english: But it's been a while since we've had a party, and all we're having is just a cup of tea... Aren't we being a bit too modest?
1000639480.korean: 근데 간만에 파티인데 꼴랑 차 한잔이라니... 우리 너무 소박한 거 아냐?

1000639481.english: Because the squad leader confiscated all the snacks...

1000639482.english: So. They even took all the juice I was saving.
1000639482.korean: 그러니까. 내가 아껴둔 쥬스까지 전부 뺏겼어.

1000639483.english: Ugh, I told you I was going to give it to you as a gift! Anyone who hears this might misunderstand!
1000639483.korean: 윽, 선물할거라고 했잖아! 누가 들으면 오해하겠네!

1000639484.english: Hmm... but is it still too shabby...? Let me just take out a little...
1000639484.korean: 으음... 그래도 너무 초라한가...? 조금만 꺼내서...

1000639485.english: Um... sorry I'm late. May I come in...?

1000639489.english: Hey, I'm going to eat with you guys...

1000639493.english: Hey, what should we do between the second and third songs?
1000639493.korean: 있지, 우리 두 번째랑 세 번째 곡 사이에 뭐 할까?

1000639494.english: We have to set up the instruments, you know. Huh?

1000639495.english: Yeah... I hadn't thought about that.

1000639496.english: It would be nice if there were guests...

1000639498.english: You just need to stand on the stage a little longer before Linty goes down.
1000639498.korean: 린티가 내려가기 전에 좀 더 무대에 서있으면 돼.

1000639501.english: Muse, don't you have any solo songs?

1000639502.english: I think it would be perfect to put it there.

1000639504.english: Since the next song is an upbeat one, would it be a bit much to have a ballad?
1000639504.korean: 뒤가 바로 신나는 노래니까 너무 발라드는 조금 그러려나?

1000639507.english: Why not? Let me hear it for you!

1000639508.english: Ah! Come to think of it, I've never heard Muse perform live!
1000639508.korean: 아! 그러고보니까 나, 뮤즈의 라이브는 한 번도 못 들어봤어!

1000639510.english: Tell me, okay? Anything is fine~

1000639514.english: ......Sorry. I got carried away by the mood...

1000639516.english: Ugh, you always have to spoil the mood.

1000639522.english: This is a gift from us to the former commander.

1000639523.english: Because you went through a lot of hardship juggling the role of squad leader and an idol simultaneously for quite a long time.
1000639523.korean: 짧지 않은 시간 동안 전대장 역할이랑 아이돌을 동시에 하느라 고생이 많았으니까요.

1000639524.english: hereby appoint you... as the leader of the idol group Sky Knights...
1000639524.korean: 귀하를... 아이돌 그룹 스카이나이츠의 리더로 임명합니다...

1000639527.english: I look forward to the performance.

1000639531.english: That's right, that's right, good boy~

1000639534.english: I didn't know our leader had such weak tear ducts.
1000639534.korean: 우리 리더가 이렇게 눈물샘이 취약한줄은 몰랐네~

1000639535.english: No... I think this makes sense.

1000639539.english: Let's make sure to sing wonderfully tomorrow.

1000639544.english: - I carefully closed the door to the accommodation so as not to be caught.
1000639544.korean: - 들키지 않도록 조심스럽게 숙소 문을 닫았다.

1000639545.english: - The overwhelming feeling I felt last time fills my heart.
1000639545.korean: - 저번에도 느꼈던, 뭔가 벅차는 느낌이 가슴 속을 가득 채운다.

1000639546.english: - I think I can understand Feder's feelings...
1000639546.korean: - 페더의 마음이 이해되는 것 같기도 하고...

1000639547.english: - Leaving behind the Sky Knights' quarters, where laughter could be heard again before I knew it, I turned my steps toward the captain's quarters.
1000639547.korean: - 어느새 다시 웃음소리가 들려오는 스카이나이츠의 숙소를 뒤로하고 함장실로 발걸음을 돌렸다.

1000639554.english: Leader, if you just go to sleep like that, your face is going to be all puffy tomorrow.
1000639554.korean: 리더 저거, 그냥 자면 내일 얼굴 팅팅 부을텐데.

1000639555.english: I'll just tell them to put an ice pack on it as soon as they wake up.
1000639555.korean: 일어나자마자 얼음주머니 대고 있으라고 하지 뭐.

1000639558.english: The leader is talking in her sleep again.

1000639559.english: At first, I thought they were doing that on purpose.
1000639559.korean: 난 처음엔 일부러 저러는 줄 알았어.

1000639560.english: Last time, I heard you rattle off all the foods you wanted to eat.
1000639560.korean: 저번엔 먹고 싶은 음식 줄줄 외는 거 들었어.

1000639561.english: They were like, "Ramen... tteokbokki..." I'm telling you, they were saying that.

1000639563.english: I usually eat a lot, you know?

1000639567.english: I have to sleep, what else can I do?

1000639569.english: I vote for Linty is working~

1000639575.english: They say they aren't asleep yet.

1000639577.english: What are you planning to send?

1000639578.english: What are you doing up... not sleeping... Tomorrow is... the performance...
1000639578.korean: 안자고... 뭐 하는 거야... 내일이... 공연인데...

1000639579.english: Sigh. There really isn't a single bit of cuteness in this.

1000639581.english: How about sending a thank you?

1000639583.english: I hear the sound of erasing and rewriting somewhere~
1000639583.korean: 어디서 지우고 다시 쓰는 소리가 들리는데~

1000639589.english: Then I should go to sleep too.

1000639594.english: We will now begin the 1st Unit Meeting!

1000639596.english: Here, let's do this while eating snacks.

1000639597.english: There is a car here, too.

1000639600.english: Wow, this is my first time trying this tea! It's super delicious!
1000639600.korean: 우와, 이 차 처음 먹어보는데? 엄청 맛있다!

1000639603.english: The first agenda is! The unit name.

1000639604.english: Didn't we decide that last time? Blooming Heart.
1000639604.korean: 저번에 정한 거 아니었어? Blooming Heart.

1000639605.english: Since it wasn't a formal meeting back then, we had to decide clearly.
1000639605.korean: 그때는 정식 회의가 아니었으니까 확실하게 정해야지.

1000639607.english: Huh? Wasn't it? It was definitely Blooming Heart...
1000639607.korean: 어? 아니었어? 분명히 Blooming Heart 였는데...

1000639608.english: Blooming Heart is just a notation.

1000639609.english: It is written as "Blooming Heart" and read as "a blooming heart."

1000639612.english: Hmm. I've felt this before, but it seems like something amazing. I'm not entirely sure, though.
1000639612.korean: 음음. 전에도 느꼈지만, 뭔가 굉장한 것 같아. 잘은 모르겠어도.

1000639613.english: I'm not really sure if it reads that differently either... but the meaning is good.
1000639613.korean: 나도 그렇게 다르게 읽는 건 잘 모르겠지만... 의미는 좋아.

1000639614.english: It also matches well with the song concept we talked about last time.
1000639614.korean: 저번에 얘기했던 노래 컨셉이랑도 잘 어울리구.

1000639615.english: Okay, then we've decided our unit name is "Blooming Heart"!
1000639615.korean: 좋아, 그럼 우리 유닛명은 "피어나는 마음"으로 결정!

1000639617.english: I came up with it... but it's a really cool name.

1000639618.english: So, this is the second one. The song concept I talked about last time... Yum.
1000639618.korean: 그럼 두 번째야. 내가 저번에 얘기했던 곡 컨셉... 냠.

1000639619.english: Let's talk about that a bit more.

1000639620.english: You were talking about comparing the producer and us to stars, right?

1000639621.english: I wrote down a few things to refer to and some lyrics that came to mind.

1000639830.english: Did you know? When I first came to Orca, I never thought I could be this close with the last humans and the resistance's supreme commander.
1000639830.korean: 그거 알아? 내가 오르카에 처음 올때만 해도, 최후의 인류이자 저항군 총사령관인 사람이랑 이렇게 가깝게 지낼 수 있을 줄은 몰랐어.

1000639831.english: I just thought I'd only receive orders through the squad leader... and maybe see your face once a year from a distance, that'd be lucky.
1000639831.korean: 그냥 전대장이나 편대장 통해서 명령이나 받고... 얼굴은 1년에 한 번, 먼 발치에서나 한 번씩 보면 다행이겠구나, 했었지.

1000639833.english: - Harpeia, who had been staring at me for a while, took a small breath as if to calm herself.
1000639833.korean: - 한동안 나를 바라보던 하르페이아는 마음을 가라앉히듯 작게 숨을 들이마셨다.

1000639837.english: - Harpeia slowly reached out her arm and gently pulled my head toward her.
1000639837.korean: - 천천히 팔을 뻗은 하르페이아가 조심스레 내 머리를 끌어당겼다.

1000639838.english: - Soon, accompanied by a sweet fragrance, my face touched her soft skin.
1000639838.korean: - 곧 달콤한 향기와 함께, 얼굴이 부드러운 살결에 닿았다.

1000639839.english: I-I read it in a book. When guys... like, their crush does this for them, it gives them strength.
1000639839.korean: 채, 책에서 봤거든. 남자들은... 조, 좋아하는 여자가 이렇게 해주면 힘이 난다구.

1000639842.english: - Then, muttering "I can't help it," Harpyia gently stroked the back of my head.
1000639842.korean: - 그러면 어쩔 수 없네, 하고 중얼거린 하르페이아가 부드럽게 내 뒷머리를 쓰다듬었다.

1000639843.english: - In the quiet room, where only the distant voices of other members and the rustling of collars could be heard, we spent a while feeling each other's warmth.
1000639843.korean: - 멀리서 들리는 다른 대원들의 말 소리와 옷깃이 스치는 소리만 흐르는 조용한 방 안에서, 우리는 한동안 서로의 체온을 느끼며 있었다.

1000639844.english: - Resolving her feelings, she got up from the spot.

1000639848.english: - Hraesvelgr said that, hiding the panel she was holding behind her back.
1000639848.korean: - 흐레스벨그는 그렇게 말하며 들고 있던 패널을 등 뒤로 숨겼다.

1000639849.english: - Suddenly, an image of someone wanting to capture me—precisely me and the members spending time with me—on camera flashed briefly.
1000639849.korean: - 내 모습... 정확히는 나, 그리고 나와 함께 시간을 보내는 대원들의 모습을 렌즈에 담고 싶어하는 누군가의 모습이 순간적으로 떠올랐다.

1000639851.english: - Hraesvelgr slowly lowered her posture and tried to find an escape route, but I was blocking the only door.
1000639851.korean: - 흐레스벨그는 천천히 자세를 낮추고 퇴로를 찾았지만, 유일한 퇴로인 문은 내가 가로막고있다.

1000639852.english: ...If you're the Producer, you'd probably know what answer I'll give.
1000639852.korean: ...제가 무슨 대답을 할 지, 프로듀서라면 알고 계실 겁니다.

1000639853.english: I suppose you could say that.

1000639854.english: - A flowing silence. A battle of wills to find the opponent's weakness.
1000639854.korean: - 흐르는 정적. 상대의 빈틈을 찾기 위한 기싸움.

1000639855.english: - A few seconds later, as if she had finally found an opening, Hresvelgr’s leg slammed into the floor.
1000639855.korean: - 몇 초뒤, 마침내 빈틈을 찾아낸 것인지 흐레스벨그의 다리가 바닥을 박찼다.

1000639858.english: - It seems they were aiming for a tiny opening in my side... but unfortunately, the physical abilities of Air Force bioroids aren't generally that impressive.
1000639858.korean: - 내 옆구리의 아주 작은 빈틈을 노린 모양이지만... 불행히도 공군 소속 바이오로이드의 신체 능력은 대체로 뛰어나지 않은 편이다.

1000639859.english: - I casually grabbed Hresvelgr by the slender waist, lifted me up, and took the panel.
1000639859.korean: - 가볍게 흐레스벨그의 가느다린 허리를 잡아채 들어올리고, 패널을 손에 넣었다.

1000639861.english: P-Please let me go now, Producer...

1000639864.english: There are... complicated circumstances. A normal person like the Producer would never understand.
1000639864.korean: 거기에는... 복잡한 사정이 있습니다. 프로듀서같은 일반인은 절대로 이해하지 못하시겠죠.

1000639865.english: - What Hraesvelgr was watching on the panel was an animation featuring Momo. It was understandable in a way, but I overthought it too much.
1000639865.korean: - 흐레스벨그가 패널로 보고 있던 건 모모가 등장하는 애니메이션이었다. 어떻게 보면 당연한건데, 너무 꼬아서 생각해버렸다.

1000639867.english: ...Anyone who has watched Momo even once with me... never brought up anything related to Momo again.
1000639867.korean: ...저와 한 번이라도 모모를 같이 본 분은... 다시는 모모 관련해서 이야기를 꺼내지 않았거든요.

1000639868.english: Then, may I ask a preliminary question? How much do you know about Momo, Producer?
1000639868.korean: 그럼 사전 질문을 드리겠습니다. 프로듀서는 모모에 대해서 얼마나 아십니까?

1000639869.english: Not Momo the resistance member, but the Momo animation and the character named Momo.
1000639869.korean: 저항군의 일원인 모모 님이 아니라, 모모 애니메이션과 그 등장인물인 모모에 대해서, 입니다.

1000639871.english: Then let's take a look at this! It is the 8th OVA of Momo. Although it is known to be unfriendly because it lacks any background explanation, it is a work that is praised as a 20 minutes invaluable to those who can find its hidden meanings and symbols.
1000639871.korean: 그러면 이걸 보도록 하죠! 모모 8기 OVA인데, 배경 설명이 하나도 없어서 불친절하다고 알려져있지만, 그 숨은 의미와 상징들을 찾아낼 수 있는 자들에게는 그 무엇보다도 값진 20분이라는 평을 듣는 작품입니다.

1000639872.english: No, what's the point of explaining? Just take a look. You can listen to my explanation while watching. No matter how much the producer knows, compared to me...
1000639872.korean: 아니, 설명을 해 뭐하겠습니까. 일단 보시죠. 보면서 제 설명을 들으시면 됩니다. 아무리 프로듀서가 어느정도 아신다고 해도, 저보다는...

1000639873.english: - When I came to my senses, I was sitting shoulder to shoulder with Hraesvelgr, watching an animation that featured familiar faces but whose plot I had no idea what it was about.
1000639873.korean: - 정신을 차려보니 나는 흐레스벨그와 어깨를 맞대고 앉아 익숙한 얼굴이 등장하긴 하지만, 무슨 내용인지 모를 애니메이션을 보게 되었다.

1000639874.english: - Even after the animation ended, Hraesvelgr's passionate explanation continued endlessly, and eventually, they were only released at dawn the next day...
1000639874.korean: - 애니메이션이 끝난 후에도 흐레스벨그의 열정적인 설명은 끝을 모르고 이어졌고, 결국 다음날 동이 틀 때가 되서야 풀려날 수 있었다...

1000639877.english: ......Because you might not find it interesting.

1000639879.english: - In response to my question, Hresvelg bowed her head deeply.
1000639879.korean: - 내 물음에 흐레스벨그는 고개를 푹 숙였다.

1000639880.english: - After fidgeting with her fingers for a moment, Hresvelg finally spoke in a quiet voice.
1000639880.korean: - 한동안 손가락을 꼼지락대던 흐레스벨그는 작은 목소리로 겨우 입을 열었다.

1000639881.english: Because I want you to like the things I like...

1000639883.english: - At that single remark, it seemed that Hraesvelgr's contradictory behavior up until now made sense.
1000639883.korean: - 그 말 한마디에, 지금까지의 흐레스벨그의 모순된 행동이 이해가 되는 것 같았다.

1000639884.english: - Trying to hide it, yet hoping they notice and like it...

1000639888.english: - Hraesvelgr, who had let out a small laugh, pulled my hand and slumped onto the practice room floor.
1000639888.korean: - 작게 웃음을 터뜨렸던 흐레스벨그는 내 손을 끌어당기며 연습실 바닥에 주저앉았다.

1000639891.english: - Hraesvelgr manipulated the panel to play the first episode of the first season of the Momo animation.
1000639891.korean: - 흐레스벨그는 패널을 조작해 모모 애니메이션의 1기, 1화를 재생했다.

1000639892.english: - Soon the opening theme played, and familiar faces began to appear, but...
1000639892.korean: - 곧 오프닝이 흘러나오고, 익숙한 얼굴들이 등장하기 시작했지만.

1000639893.english: - The ending came out, then episode 2, episode 3...

1000639894.english: - Until the end of the last episode of Season 1, Hraesvelgr was staring only at my profile.
1000639894.korean: - 1기의 마지막 화가 끝날 때까지, 흐레스벨그는 내 옆얼굴만을 바라보고 있었다.

1000639895.english: - I made up my mind and stood up from my seat.

1000639897.english: - I came up onto the deck of the anchored Orca as darkness had fallen.
1000639897.korean: - 어둠이 내려앉은, 정박중인 오르카 호의 갑판에 올라왔다.

1000639898.english: - To utilize personnel efficiently, external perimeter security has recently been shifted to unmanned systems and sensors, so naturally, there is no one on the deck at this time...
1000639898.korean: - 인원 활용을 위해 얼마 전부터 함선 외부 경계는 무인시스템과 센서로 돌렸기에, 이 시간의 갑판에는 당연히 아무도 없...

1000639901.english: - For a moment, it seemed like something pitch black brushed past the edge of my vision. It looked like it was near the stage...
1000639901.korean: - 순간 시야 끝에 뭔가 시커먼 것이 스친 것 같았다. 무대 쪽인 것 같은데...

1000639902.english: - As I squinted and concentrated, the silhouettes moving around the stage soon came into distinct view.
1000639902.korean: - 눈을 가늘게 뜨고 집중하자 곧, 무대 이곳저곳을 돌아다니는 실루엣의 모습이 확연히 눈에 들어왔다.

1000639903.english: - I tried to sneak up and surprise them, but unfortunately, I ended up stepping on something on the floor.
1000639903.korean: - 놀래켜주기 위해 자세를 낮추고 살금살금 접근하려 했지만, 불행히도 바닥에 떨어진 무언가를 밟고 말았다.

1000639905.english: I said who it is! Hwarang!

1000639906.english: - While I was rummaging through my memories to recall the answer, someone in front of me...
1000639906.korean: - 답어를 기억해내기 위해 기억을 더듬는 사이, 내 앞의 누군가는...

1000639907.english: - I ended up ringing the emergency bell.

1000639909.english: I, I'm sorry... I didn't know you were a producer...

1000639910.english: - The Orca was turned upside down. After the crew returned to sleep, Sleipnir, who had been restless the whole time, clung to me on the verge of tears.
1000639910.korean: - 오르카 호가 발칵 뒤집혔다 대원들이 다시 취침하러 돌아간 뒤, 계속해서 안절부절하던 슬레이프니르가 내게 울먹이며 매달렸다.

1000639911.english: But you still didn't recognize the producer...
